MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Leonard Marquez, Esq. of Wendel, Rosen, et al, 510-834-6600 for defendant and moving party D.R. HORTON, A CORPORATION, DHI MORTGAGE, COMPANY, MICHAEL MASON, DANIEL CALLIHAN, ANNE SCHANKIN.
Patrick Missud, Esq., 415-584-7251, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT D.R. HORTON, A CORPORATION, DHI MORTGAGE, COMPANY, MICHAEL MASON, DANIEL CALLIHAN, ANNE SCHANKIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO OPPOSITION IS TIMELY FILED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS ATTACHED TO THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. THE COURT GAVE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL AN OPPORTUNITY TO WAIVE THE PROOF OF SERVICE IRREGULARITIES AND DECLINED TO DO SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/JLW/DS)
